notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Taylor Walls. Masataka Yoshida scores. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Taylor Walls.

notableEvents.label: Jarren Duran GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Jarren Duran out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jarren Duran rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Jarren Duran out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Ryan Vilade out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Taylor Walls. Masataka Yoshida scores. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Taylor Walls.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Taylor Walls. Masataka Yoshida scores. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Taylor Walls.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcelo Mayer to shortstop Trevor Story to first baseman Willson Contreras. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Ryan Vilade out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Junior Caminero scores. Jonny DeLuca scores. Ben Williamson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson triples (3) on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Ben Williamson scores.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
